---
title: "gym"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-24"
---

```{r}
library(wesanderson)
df0 <- read_sheet("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1X5fOpv3X5z6lQWCIW4AoSDacmQAzZ2_kX-flZb7BGBQ/edit?gid=0#gid=0") %>% as.data.frame()
df0[is.na(df0)] <- ""

df1 <- df0$Archetype %>% srt %>% as.data.frame()
colnames(df1) <- c("archetype", "count")

data <- data.frame(
  group=LETTERS[1:5],
  value=c(13,7,9,21,2)
)

# Basic piechart
ggplot(df1, aes(x="", y=count, fill=archetype)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", width=1, color="white") +
  coord_polar("y", start=0) +
  theme_void() + 
  geom_text(aes(label = archetype), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5)) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Set1")

```
